parsed_review.summary: CP00-307 (RP09 CRM core, Risk C, 150 units, range RP09.P04.M06.S06-RP09.P05.M05.S07) is a descriptor-only closeout pack and its production_ready_candidate claim is supported. Evidence verified through read-only tools (Read/Grep/Glob) only: (1) command-evidence.json records all 21 implementation/test/contract/plan/repo-wide validation commands at exit_code 0, with production_ready=false, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false, and Hermes gate H09 passed; (2) validators.js derives production_ready_candidate strictly from coverage.valid && foundation.valid, and the foundation validator enforces per-row descriptor_only/runtime_execution=false/customer_safe_errors_only/raw_payload_included=false plus the authority boundary (claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true); (3) registry no-write attestation keeps promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false, and carries the CP178+ forbidden_review_evidence list; (4) model.test.js asserts the 150-unit binding, descriptor-only rows (real_client_data_loaded=false, cross_tenant_access_allowed=false, dispatches_ai_runtime=false, claude_is_final_approval=false), and the evidence packets; (5) deliverable/phase/micro distributions reconcile to 150 (P04:83/P05:67). Review hardening is clean: readiness auth_preflight passed with valid non-empty JSON stdout (not fenced, not tool-call-shaped), validation-report shows no forbidden tools and an allowed source_inspection_mode, and changed-file-scope cleanly separates pack refs from unrelated dirty files (the .docx and the ldip invalid-attempt JSON are preserved, not attributed to this pack). Pack-level production_ready correctly remains false and manifest status is implemented_pending_review, deferring the enterprise trust claim to required human final approval; Claude is confirmed a read-only independent reviewer and not the final approver; Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic review packet/receipt handling, not embedded product runtime. The downstream raw-output.json and review-receipt.json are appropriately absent because they are generated from this review step. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
